title: Sirajganj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sirajganj with a Z-Score of +3.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Sirajganj has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is combined with a humidity of 81% and a wind speed of 12.3 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 9.6 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy consumption for cooling purposes.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
